docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-01-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE THE DEFENDANT REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE FROM THE CLERK'S OFFICE. THE COURT GRANTS THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF PATRICK MUITHYA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALFREDO ZAMORA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MUITHYA, PATRICK
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MUITHYA, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, ALFREDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $250.00. ORIGINAL PROOF NOT SUBMITTED, COPY FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT. SERVED NOV-01-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, ALFREDO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF PATRICK MUITHYA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALFREDO ZAMORA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUITHYA, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMORA, ALFREDO $4,470.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,595.00, FOR AN ADDITIONAL 25 DAYS FOR LOSS OF INCOME IN CONNECTION WITH A TAXI CAB TOTALED IN A CAR ACCIDENT, AT RATE OF $178.00 PER DAY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
